findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 34. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Figure panel labels and year annotations extracted as standalone body paragraphs mid-content, breaking reading flow. Labels 'A', '2021', and 'A' appear between Figures 4 and 5 captions; another 'A' appears between Figures 9 and 10; '2020' appears between Figures 10 and 11. These are figure overlay annotations in the PDF (e.g., panel labels A/B/C and year markers on composite maps) that should not be rendered as separate text paragraphs.
findings.evidence:
HTML contains:

A

2021

A

after Figure 4 caption and before Figure 5;

A

after Figure 9 caption and before Figure 10;

2020

after Figure 10 caption and before Figure 11. In the PDF, 'A' is a panel label overlaid on the map image (page 10, 16) and '2021'/'2020' are year labels on figures (pages 10, 17).
